security.heading: This is what security feels like

walletTypeComparison.requiresHardwareWalletApp: Requires the hardware wallet companion app
walletTypeComparison.requiresSoftwareWalletInternet: Requires the software wallet and internet connection
walletTypeComparison.keysNeverLeaveDevice: Your private keys never leave unencrypted the cold wallet. Transactions are signed locally, significantly reducing the risk of unauthorized access.
walletTypeComparison.softwareWalletRisks: Software wallets are always connected to the internet and susceptible to cyber-attacks, including phishing, malware, keylogging, and hacking.
walletTypeComparison.exchangeAccountRisks: Your exchange account is susceptible to cyber-attacks, including phishing, malware, keylogging, and hacking. In addition, as the exchange owns the private key to your crypto, you are at risk of fund misuse.
walletTypeComparison.companionApp: Can be used with a companion mobile and desktop app
walletTypeComparison.longTermStorage: Storing small and large amounts of crypto either for daily transactions or long-term investments
walletTypeComparison.shortTermStorage: Storing small and short-term crypto that is used for daily transactions
walletTypeComparison.tradingShortTerm: Trading and keeping large amounts for a short period of time to limit exposure
walletTypeComparison.ledgerExamples: Ledger Nano S Plus, Ledger Nano X, Ledger Stax, Ledger Flex

ledgerRecover.disclaimer: Ledger Recover availability depends on the country/region where your identity document is issued. Visit <availabilityLink>here</availabilityLink> for country/region availability. Subscription requires a valid passport or national identity card. Valid driver's licenses also accepted for Canadian and US users. Subscriptions are non-refundable except where statutory refund/cancellation rights apply. Redeem codes are valid for 1 year from purchase date. Subscriptions operate on an automatic renewal basis. Please note that while the redeem code purchase is charged in your local currency, any monthly renewal payment will be processed in EUR (Euros). Due to fluctuating exchange rates, the price in your local currency may vary at the time of each payment and you may incur additional fees from your bank for currency conversion. Cancel anytime to prevent future charges. By clicking "Buy it now", you agree to accept these terms and the <redeemCodeLink>Ledger Recover Redeem Code T&Cs here</redeemCodeLink>.

platformsComparison.title: Why settle for less?
platformsComparison.subtitle: Make the most of Web3 with more clarity, confidence, and control.

ownership.label: Ownership
ownership.ledger: You have full control over your crypto with safety nets at every step.
ownership.softwareWallets: You hold the keys, but they're online and vulnerable to hacks.
ownership.exchanges: You don't actually own your assets, the exchange does

exposure.label: Exposure
exposure.ledger: Verify transaction details before signing. Only you can approve.
exposure.softwareWallets: You can easily be tricked to approve smart contracts that drain your wallet.
exposure.exchanges: Millions are lost every year to hacks. You have no control.

guidance.label: Guidance
guidance.ledger: User friendly app, step by step tutorials, market insights and more.
guidance.softwareWallets:
You're on your own.
No guardrails for newcomers.
guidance.exchanges: They don't teach you how to stay safe and truly own your assets.

dApps.title: Why is this important to you?
dApps.subtitle: Other wallets are accessible in dApps while Ledger keeps your private keys safe

content.value: Your crypto voucher will be added to your purchase at checkout and included in your shipment.
When your signer arrives, the crypto voucher will be in the box. Scan the QR code for detailed redeem instructions.
You'll receive your crypto reward approximately 2 weeks after entering the redemption code in the Ledger Wallet referral page.
When adding your new Ledger hardware wallet to the cart, your Bitcoin voucher is automatically added to the cart as well.
Your Bitcoin voucher with a unique redemption code on it will be included in the packaging when you receive your Ledger device.
Enter the redemption code via Ledger Wallet™. For more detailed instructions, scan the QR code located on the back of the voucher.
Your crypto voucher will be added to your purchase at checkout and included in your shipment.
When your signer arrives, the crypto voucher will be in the box. Scan the QR code for detailed redeem instructions.
You'll receive your crypto reward approximately 2 weeks after entering the redemption code in the Ledger Wallet referral page.

Please note that while the redeem code purchase is charged in your local currency, any monthly renewal payment will be processed in EUR (Euros).
